title: nephrodium parasiticum
intro: Nephrodium parasiticum, also known as the polypody fern, is a type of epiphytic fern that grows on trees and other surfaces. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium parasiticum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or it is combined with other herbs to create infusions that can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
